modules.description: Dashboard shows overall user performance and activity.

images.description: Dashboard screen showing links converted, channels and earnings

modules.description: Profile section to manage affiliate tags and account details.
features: Request Flipkart and Shopsy tag via support

images.description: Profile page where affiliate tags can be added

modules.description: Convert product links into profit links.
Telegram bots used to convert links into profit links.
workflow: Login using Hyyzo registered phone number

modules.description: Setup Telegram channel for automated deal posting.
setup_steps: Enter channel username (starts with @) or ID (starts with -100)
channel_id_process: Forward any message to the bot

modules.description: View and analyze all tracking reports.
Replace specific text in Telegram deal posts.

features: Set timer to avoid duplicate deals
